dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have been suffering from a persistent cough and significant respiratory distress for the past four days.

To help me better understand what you are experiencing, could you describe the character of this cough—is it dry or productive—and have you had any associated fevers, chest pain, or wheezing during these past four days?
My cough is productive of yellow-green sputum. I have experienced fevers up to 38.7C, shortness of breath on exertion, and right-sided pleuritic chest pain.
Understood. Do you have any known allergies to medications, foods, or environmental factors?
I have an allergy to penicillin, which causes a rash.
[DDX] (Community-acquired pneumonia; Acute exacerbation of COPD; Pulmonary embolism; Congestive heart failure; Viral bronchitis)
